calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Off Calendar

Petition To Terminate Formal Proceedings; And For Authority To Administer Estate Pursuant To Probate Code Section 7660(A)(1)
Off Calendar Jul-09-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared by telephone for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Ms. Mannion stated that they detailed their efforts to contact David Dyre in a declaration, that the bank would not give them any information even though they may have dates of birth or social security numbers, that there are several David Dyres in California, that it seems unlikely that they will be able to collect the $33,000.00 from US Bank because David is the named Beneficiary and that the value of the estate is now less than $150,000.00. The Court questions what happens to the funds if not claimed. Ms. Mannion stated that the funds do not go to the estate, that the bank has its own process for escheating funds to the State and that even though the Public Administrator has letters, the bank does not provide all information. Ms. Mannion also stated that David Turpin Attorney for the heirsearch company informed her that Joyce Mason is deceased, but he will not provide a date of death, spoke of the various search agencies they used to conduct a search and the difficulty in searching without specific dates of death, birth, social security numbers, etc., and stated that they have done everything they could to contact Ms. Mason. In addition, Ms. Mannion stated that Kathy Pratt (the other Beneficiary) also conducted an exhaustive search of Ms. Mason, and that Ms. Pratt resides in the UK and she too was unsuccessful. Furthermore, Ms. Mannion stated that they may petition with the Court at some point to request authority to hire an heirsearch company and that they did not file a request to dispense with notice for Joyce Mason. The Court finds that notice is sufficient. The Court granted the Petition to Terminate Formal Proceedings and for Authority to Administer Estate Pursuant to Probate Code Section 7660(a)(1), (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
